shot_type_and_framing: medium close-up, centered composition with subject occupying middle vertical space within the frame
camera_movement: slow push-in towards the jewelry and keys holder
lens_and_cinematic_look: full-frame feel with a shallow depth of field, 85mm focal length style to emphasize the subject and create creamy background bokeh
environment_description: a warm, softly focused indoor setting with neutral beige and brown tones, featuring a blurred vase with dried flowers and a soft brown cushion in the background
subject_description: a small, modern jewelry and key holder with a white marble scalloped base and gold metallic vertical and horizontal rods, holding a gold metallic watch and a pair of metal keys
motion_behavior: natural slow motion push-in maintaining consistent focal plane and gentle focus shifts on the subject
overall_cinematic_tone: grounded, premium, realistic, and filmic with warm tones and soft textures
